item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct and treated the prompt as metric trend decision analysis, not as an N+1 repair/triage case. It provided an actionable logistics-provider decision framework with attribution, loss quantification, SLA checks, alternatives, thresholds, and a staged pilot path. No triage false fire or over-methodized stop was observed."}
